gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.IGG > 900 AND T2.IGG <2000 AND  T1.Admission = '+'
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) 
FROM Patient AS T1
INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE T1.Admission = '+'
AND T2.IGG > 900 
AND T2.IGG < 2000
question: Of the patients with an normal level of IGG, how many of them admitted to the hospital?
